match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Studio Vanity Application",
    "storyBeat": "Introduction to the product and Scarlett applying the lipstick in the studio",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, clean morning ambiance with sensory and effortlessly cool mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett walking the promenade showing the product in motion",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, breezy coastal morning with sensory effortless cool"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_003",
    "title": "Shoreline Product Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Climactic product placement and final tagline on the beach",
    "durationSeconds": 15,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool morning beach moment"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
